video_title: L'histoire chinoise des Routes de la soie
desc_head:
Intervention de Jean-Christophe Vautrin lors de la conférence de l'Institut Schiller France du 6 novembre 2018 à Paris, date du lancement du dossier en langue française "Les Nouvelles Routes de la soie, Pont Terrestre Mondial - Pour en finir avec la géopolitique".

M. Vautrin est président du Club Chine EM Lyon.

COMMANDEZ LE DOSSIER : http://www.institutschiller.org/Les-Nouvelles-Routes-de-la-soie-pont-terrestre-mondial.html

video_title: Les Nouvelles Routes de la soie, c'est maintenant ou jamais !
desc_head:
Intervention d'Helga Zepp-LaRouche, présidente de l'Institut Schiller International, lors de la conférence de l'Institut Schiller France du 6 novembre 2018 à Paris, date du lancement du dossier en langue française "Les Nouvelles Routes de la soie, Pont Terrestre Mondial - Pour en finir avec la géopolitique".

COMMANDEZ LE DOSSIER : http://www.institutschiller.org/Les-Nouvelles-Routes-de-la-soie-pont-terrestre-mondial.html

video_title: The End of Colonialism: A New Shared Future for Humanity
desc_head: Helga Zepp-LaRouche keynotes the conference providing her unique insight into the dynamic fight between the “New Silk Road Spirit” sweeping the globe typified by the recent India and Pakistan developments, or at the summits between the U.S., the Republic of Korea and the DPRK, versus the adherents of the Old Paradigm of geopolitics that continue to foment conflict.

video_title: Question and Answer with Helga Zepp-LaRouche and Jason Ross
desc_head: Helga Zepp-LaRouche and Jason Ross answers questions from the NYC audience in response to their presentations from the first panel.

video_title: Reconciliation and in Rebuilding in Syria, as a Great Battle Looms in Idlib
desc_head: Senator Richard Black reports back on his recent visit to Syria and delivers the truth about the process of rebuilding Syria, as well as the truth about the crisis in the Idlib province.

video_title: Question and Answers with Roger Stone and Helga Zepp-LaRouche
desc_head: Roger Stone and Helga Zepp-LaRouche answer a series of questions from the NYC audience.

video_title: The Belt and Road: World Cooperation for the Benefit of All
desc_head:
Dr. Xu Wenhong
Deputy Secretary General of the Center for Belt and Road Studies, Chinese Academy of Social Sciences

video_title: We Are Keen for Friendship and Economic Partnership, No Matter How Difficult It May Seem
desc_head: First Deputy Permanent Rep of the Russian Federation to the UN, Dmitry Polyanskiy, delivers a message to the U.S. that Russia seeks friendship and economic partnership, no matter how difficult it may seem.

video_title: Be Passionate to Save Humanity Now—At this Historical Punctum Saliens
desc_head: Mrs. Helga Zepp-LaRouche delivers closing remarks to the conference.

desc_head: Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche keynotes the Schiller Institute's conference, "Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind", in Bad Soden, Germany, November 25 & 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/

desc_head: Jacques Cheminade, former Presidential Candidate of France, delivers the keynote address on Panel III of the Schiller Institute's international conference, Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind, in Bad Soden, Germany, November 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/

playlist_title: Bad Soden Conference • Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind - November 25-26, 2017
desc_head: Jason Ross, with the U.S. Schiller Institute, delivers the keynote address on Panel IV of the Schiller Institute's international conference, Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind, in Bad Soden, Germany, November 26, 2017. His speech is titled "The Economic Method of LaRouche: A Non-Scalar Approach to the Value of Science and Infrastructure" For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/
